Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Endless Sword]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 3''' — The Endless Sword is a Ruler technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin trains using the Endless Sword technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 17''' — The Endless Sword is a technique used by Yerin.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — The Endless Sword technique is a sword aura technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — The Endless Sword can shred dummies in the Ruler Trial.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 11''' — The Endless Sword has levels of mastery.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin's mastery of the Endless Sword is at the 'storm' stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin can activate the Endless Sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — The Endless Sword can produce pulses of sword-aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — The Endless Sword can be used to deflect attacks with pulses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — The Endless Sword does not take much madra to use.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Yerin suppresses a room with the Endless Sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — The Endless Sword technique activates the aura around the user and their Goldsigns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — The Endless Sword can cause trees to explode.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — The Endless Sword technique uses invisible claws.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin's Endless Sword can strike with an invisible blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — The Endless Sword gathered around Yerin's six Goldsigns and the sword left by the Sword Sage.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — The Endless Sword can be used as a barrier to surround the user in sword-aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — The Endless Sword technique manifests six sword-arms from Yerin's back.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Yerin's Endless Sword causes the cuts on her skin and robe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — The Sword Sage can activate the Endless Sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The Endless Sword technique has a stage called 'sword like the wind'.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin aims to be the next Sage of the Endless Sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The Endless Sword is a lineage or group of which Yerin is the sole heir.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — The Blood Shadow used the Endless Sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — The Endless Sword technique rippled through dense sword aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Endless Sword is a technique used by Ruby.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin trained the Endless Sword and lost control of it.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin's Endless Sword technique carries a touch of blood aura due to her merge with Ruby.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Yerin used the Endless Sword to relieve pressure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — The Endless Sword technique is powered by a Monarch.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — The Endless Sword is not well-suited for defense.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
